summary: Adds a notifications/activity system (Notification model + migration 0015, notifications helper/serializer/views, and REST routes) plus triggers for @mentions (messages, insights), action assignment, session bookings (both directions), and resource sharing (shared_with M2M + migration 0016). Authz is sound: notification list/detail querysets are scoped to recipient=request.user, all notification endpoints require authentication, notify() guards against self-notification, and resource visibility correctly unions owner/plan-participant/shared_with. Frontend adds an Activity tab with polling, deep-link navigation, a today indicator on the calendar, and a cleaner resource UI. Low-severity: resource shared_with uses User.objects.all() so a user may share their own uploaded resource with any existing username (only exposes their own content to a chosen user, not an escalation); consider constraining candidates to the actor's linked coaches/coachees for defense in depth.
